CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY KANTOROVICH, BORIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CROTTI, RICHARD T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROTTI, RICHARD T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANTOROVICH, BORIS $1,437.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,542.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
